title: Miskolc Heat Wave
lead: Miskolc is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Miskolc has resulted in a score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The extremely high temperatures have led to a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.9 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value remains at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 12%, and the wind speed is approximately 11.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Miskolc's residents and infrastructure.
